name: Stir-Fried Tofu and Bean Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the firm tofu between paper towels for about 30 minutes to remove excess water.
2. Cut the pressed tofu into 1/2 inch cubes.
3. Soak the bean sprouts in cold water for about 15 minutes to freshen them.
4. Remove the stems from the chilies and slice them lengthwise into thin strips.
5. Diagonally slice the green onions into pieces that are approximately 1 inch long and 1/4 inch thick, then set aside.
6. Mix together the oyster sauce, fish sauce, and water in a small bowl.
7. Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add both the vegetable oil and sesame oil, swirling them to coat the surface of the pan.
8. Once the oils are hot, add the garlic (if using) and stir-fry until it is light golden.
9. Add the tofu cubes, chilies, and bean sprouts to the wok. Stir-fry over moderate heat for about 2 minutes or until the bean sprouts become crisp-tender.
10. Pour in the oyster sauce mixture and green onions. Continue stirring over high heat until all ingredients are heated through and the mixture is boiling.
11. Transfer the stir-fried tofu and bean sprouts to a serving bowl, sprinkle with ground white pepper, and serve immediately or keep warm while preparing other dishes. Serve alongside Lime Sauce and rice if desired.
